Who We Are

Built on Strength.
Proven in the Field.

Miktar Steel and Fence is a leading supplier of premium steel products and fencing solutions across Africa. We combine industrial-grade materials with expert craftsmanship to deliver solutions that stand the test of time.

From residential perimeter fencing to large-scale commercial roofing and structural steel, we supply the quality and quantity your project demands — on time, every time.

What We Supply

Our Product Range

3D Fence

Three-dimensional welded wire panel fencing offering superior strength and a modern aesthetic. Ideal for residential, commercial, and industrial perimeters.

In Stock
Diamond Mesh Fence

Classic chain-link diamond mesh fencing, galvanised for corrosion resistance. Versatile and cost-effective for all boundary and security applications.

In Stock
Clearview Fence

High-security welded mesh with minimal visual obstruction. Perfect for estates, schools, sports facilities, and anywhere aesthetics meet security.

In Stock
Game Fence

Heavy-duty high-tensile game fencing designed to contain and protect wildlife. Available in various heights and strengths for all game ranch requirements.

In Stock
Field Fence

Agricultural field fencing for livestock and farm boundary applications. Durable, flexible, and built to withstand tough outdoor conditions.

In Stock
Barbed Wire

High-tensile galvanised barbed wire for farm boundaries, perimeter security, and general fencing. Available in single and double strand configurations.

In Stock
Galvanized Wire

General-purpose galvanised wire for tying, binding, fencing, and construction use. Available in multiple gauges for a wide range of applications.

In Stock
Razor Wire

Concertina and flat-wrap razor wire for high-security perimeter protection. Sharp, deterrent-grade steel tape for maximum intrusion prevention.

In Stock
Electric Fence

Complete electric fencing systems including energisers, cables, insulators, and accessories. Suitable for residential, commercial, and agricultural security.

In Stock

Get a fast, no-obligation quote from our team. We deliver across Zimbabwe and the wider region.

Why Choose Miktar

The Miktar Difference

We don't just supply steel — we supply confidence. Every product that leaves our yard meets our rigorous quality standards, backed by years of industry expertise.

01
Premium Quality Materials

All our steel and fencing products meet SABS and international standards. We source from certified mills and manufacturers only.

02
Competitive Pricing

Direct supplier relationships mean we pass savings on to you. Volume discounts available for trade and commercial customers.

03
Fast Nationwide Delivery

Our logistics network covers Zimbabwe and neighbouring countries. We deliver on time so your project stays on schedule.

04
Expert Technical Advice

Our team has decades of hands-on experience. We'll help you select the right specification for your project at no extra cost.
